author.bio: Creator of @manyver_se. Open source freelancer and #scuttlebutt solarpunk
author.name: André Staltz

content.text:
My first impressions of #Rust after having spent about 5 hours writing a small module:

It makes me excited to code in, but for different reasons than other languages excite me. Coding in Rust appeals strongly to perfectionism.
content.html:

It makes me excited to code in, but for different reasons than other languages excite me. Coding in Rust appeals strongly to perfectionism.
